name: HR managers in small to medium-sized companies using Gusto for employee benefits management tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized companies using Gusto processing 5–15 employee benefits updates/month, manual tracking causes delays in communication. We automate the process instead of manual spreadsheets and email notifications.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized companies using Gusto for employee benefits management
problem_solved: Manual tracking of employee benefits updates
